it:16.3: "Sekhassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno appattamānasassa anuttaraṁ yogakkhemaṁ patthayamānassa viharato ajjhattikaṁ aṅganti karitvā nāññaṁ ekaṅgampi samanupassāmi yaṁ evaṁ bahūpakāraṁ yathayidaṁ, bhikkhave, yoniso manasikāro. Yoniso, bhikkhave, bhikkhu manasi karonto akusalaṁ pajahati, kusalaṁ bhāvetī"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
it:16.5:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Chaṭṭhaṁ.
